things.name: Te Papa Museum
things.description: New Zealand's national museum with extraordinary Maori collection and earthquake simulator

things.name: Wellington Cable Car
things.description: Iconic red cable car from Lambton Quay to the Botanic Garden and observatory

things.name: Weta Workshop
things.description: Film props and special effects workshop behind Lord of the Rings, King Kong and Avatar

things.name: Wellington Waterfront
things.description: 7km harbour walk with Frank Kitts Park, Frank the tin man sculpture and water taxis

things.name: Mount Victoria Lookout
things.description: Panoramic views of the harbour and beyond from the summit of Mount Victoria

things.name: Cuban Quarter (Cuba Street)
things.description: Wellington's arts and culture hub with independent shops, cafes and street art

things.name: Zealandia Ecosanctuary
things.description: Urban eco-sanctuary with tuatara, kaka and rare birds in a valley 2km from the CBD

things.name: Martinborough Wine Village
things.description: Day trip to charming wine village with Pinot Noir vineyards on the Wairarapa plains

things.name: New Zealand Parliament (Beehive)
things.description: Tours of the distinctive 1977 circular Executive Wing and historic Parliament Buildings

things.name: Wellington Zoo
things.description: New Zealand's oldest zoo with nocturnal kiwi house and tuatara enclosure
